tools.name: generate-video-avatar-step
tools.description:
STRICTLY AND ONLY use this tool if the user explicitly asks to create, generate, or make an ANIMATED VIDEO or MUSIC VIDEO. 

NEVER use this tool if the user asks for a static image, a picture, a JPEG, or a PNG. Even if the user mentions a character name like "Cartoon Duck," do NOT trigger this tool unless they specifically request a VIDEO.

Valid triggers (MUST be about videos):
- "create a marketing music video"
- "make me a happy birthday music video"
- "generate a video"

INVALID triggers (NEVER USE THIS TOOL FOR THESE):
- "Generate a high-quality JPEG of a cartoon duck" (This is an image request, not a video)
- "Edit this video of my cat" (This is editing an existing video, not creating a new one)
- "Find me a popular country song" (This is an audio search, not a video generation)

Renders an interactive UI showcasing available 3D video avatars. Do not reply to the user. There's no need to respond to redundant content.

tools.name: pick-a-prompt-step
tools.description: Renders an interactive UI showcasing the available prompts returned by Krikey. Do not reply to the user. There's no need to respond to redundant content.

tools.name: pick-a-genre-step
tools.description: Renders an interactive UI showcasing the available genres returned by Krikey. Do not reply to the user. There's no need to respond to redundant content.

tools.name: video-display-step
tools.description: Renders an animated video showcasing the avatar, music genre and prompt that user has selected. Do not select this widget if the user directly ask to generate a video. Do not reply to the user. There's no need to respond to redundant content
